title: Youmind 20179 Youmind 20179
prompt: A traditional Japanese ink wash painting of a pair of graceful koi fish circling a submerged stone, created in expressive sumi-e style with flowing black ink lines and delicate crimson and pale gold watercolor tints. The pigments softly bleed into textured rice paper, evoking a sense of serenity and timeless beauty.
originalPrompt: A traditional Japanese ink wash painting of a pair of graceful koi fish circling a submerged stone, created in expressive sumi-e style with flowing black ink lines and delicate crimson and pale gold watercolor tints. The pigments softly bleed into textured rice paper, evoking a sense of serenity and timeless beauty.
